data.title: Bitwise Donates $150,000 to Support Bitcoin Open Source Developers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto asset management company Bitwise announced on the X platform that it donated $150,000 to support Bitcoin open source developers. When the Bitwise Bitcoin ETF ($BITB) was launched, it promised to donate 10% of its gross profit each year. Bitwise said it was pleased to fulfill this commitment through its first annual donation. Three organizations will allocate relevant funds, namely Brink, OpenSats, and the Human Rights Foundation.

data.title: US judge rules Musk team can access US Department of Education systems
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, a US judge ruled that Musk's team can access the US Department of Education's system. (Jinshi)

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Politicians abandoning their supporters may have no consequences in the crypto space, but may affect their political careers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform, "The game is the game. If you are a politician, betraying your supporters may have no consequences in the crypto field, but your political career may be affected. Whether it is worth it depends on whether you value your supporters."

data.title: Uniswap Labs posts hint at support for Monad Network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Uniswap Labs posted a message on the X platform suggesting that it will support the Monad network, including the integration of Uniswap wallets and web applications.

data.title: Market News: Google is exploring ways to simplify BTC adoption
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, search giant Google is exploring ways to simplify BTC adoption.

data.title: Bitcoin mining company MARA has acquired a wind farm in Texas
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining company MARA announced that it has acquired a wind farm in Texas. The acquisition will add 114 megawatts of wind power capacity to MARA's asset base for expansion into the energy infrastructure sector. The company will use the latest generation of ASIC mining hardware powered by renewable energy to reduce the cost of Bitcoin production. MARA is the second largest publicly traded corporate Bitcoin holder, with 45,659 BTC on its balance sheet. (Coindesk)

data.title: Market News: Some users have received FTX payments on the Kraken platform
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Aggr News on the X platform, some users have reported receiving FTX's repayment funds on the Kraken platform.
According to previous news, FTX plans to start repaying $16 billion of creditors on February 18, 2025, and will repay $6.5-7 billion in the first phase. The payment is based on the price in November 2022.

data.title: Crypto security company Blockaid completes $50 million Series B financing, led by Ribbit Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto security platform Blockaid announced the completion of a $50 million Series B financing round, led by Ribbit Capital, with participation from GV (formerly Google Ventures) and existing investors Variant and Cyberstarts. This financing will help Blockaid cope with the growing cybercrime risks in the digital asset sector. Blockaid plans to use the funds to expand operations and increase investment in research and development, and expects to double its headcount this year. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Grayscale transfers approximately 686 BTC to Coinbase Prime Deposit address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, about 28 minutes ago, the Grayscale Bitcoin ETF transferred approximately 686.088 BTC worth US$66.1 million to the Coinbase Prime Deposit address.

data.title: The illusion of Bitcoin’s decline arises as protocol-driven transaction collapse distorts on-chain valuation signals
data.description:
The latest Bitcoin network activity metrics reveal a paradoxical situation in which surface-level indicators suggest a decline, potentially misrepresenting its true value. CryptoQuant research earlier this month showed that the Bitcoin Network Activity Index dropped to 3,760 points in early February, its lowest since February 2024.
